name: humanspec_AMY1_locus_chimpanzee
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: AMY1_locus. Status in Pan troglodytes: 'copy_number_variable_in_apes'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr1:~104.1 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr1. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for AMY1_locus. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. AMY1_locus)
